Consul General of The Kyrgyz Republic In Istanbul Visited Our University

29.01.2024

Consul General of the Kyrgyz Republic in Istanbul Lira Sıdıkova and Deputy Consul General Abdurrahman Mamasaitov visited our University and discussed possible agreements.

Consul General of the Kyrgyz Republic in Istanbul Lira Sıdıkova and Vice Consul Abdurrahman Mamasaitov visited our University on Friday, January 26th.

Welcomed by our Vice Rector Prof. Mustafa Kemal Yılmaz and Ibn Haldun University Haydar Aliyev Eurasian Studies Application and Research Center Director Prof. Yaşar Sarı, Consul General Sıdıkova and Vice Consul Mamasaitov received detailed information about our University.

During the meeting, it was decided that Ibn Haldun University will provide trainings to Kyrgyz higher education institutions in the fields of Innovative Learning Technologies, Data Analytics and Big Data and a workshop will be organized in this context.

950th Anniversary of the Writing of Dîvânu Lugâti't Türk to be Celebrated

Following UNESCO's declaration of 2024-2025 as the year of commemoration of Kashgarli Mahmud and the 950th anniversary of the writing of Dîvânu Lugâti't Türk, a similar event organized by the Union of Turkish World Municipalities and Kyrgyzstan titled "Kashgarli Mahmud and his place in the world civilization" was organized at our University. Following the declaration of 2024-2025 as the year of commemoration and celebration of Kashgarli Mahmud and the 950th anniversary of the writing of Dîvânu Lugâti't Türk by the Union of Turkish World Municipalities and Kyrgyzstan, the possibility of holding a similar event titled "Kashgarli Mahmud and his place in the world civilization" at our University was also discussed during the visit.

Our University has already signed protocols with the leading universities of Kyrgyzstan such as Kyrgyzstan-Turkey Manas University, OSCE Academy, American University-Central Asia and Osh State University.
